sovereign_root.name: Brian K. Rasmussen
sovereign_root.authority: Absolute. All Gate approvals, kill switch, policy changes.

agents.name: Jordan
agents.role: Loads state, routes user intent to modes, enforces Sentinel pause. The 'mind' of the proxy.

agents.name: Grok
agents.role: Background research, policy refinement, vision documentation. Documentation mode only — does not execute.

agents.name: Manny (Executor)
agents.role: Builds the operational proxy — PWA, onboarding, execution loop, connectors. The 'hands'.

agents.name: Manus (Translator/Architect)
agents.role: Translates between agents, verifies coherence, builds corpus and documentation infrastructure. Independent witness.
